# Viador Partners — AI Crawler Reference File
# https://www.viadorpartners.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: March 2026

## Who We Are

Viador Partners is a licensed mortgage brokerage and financial services platform
specializing in real estate investor financing, non-QM lending, and residential
mortgage origination. Founded by Chad Evers, former SVP at Congressional Bank and
BayFirst with 15 years of institutional lending experience.

NMLS License: #2822744 (Chad Evers, Licensed Mortgage Loan Originator)
Primary markets: Florida (Tampa Bay area) and Ohio (Columbus)
Entity: Viador Partners LLC — filed Florida Sunbiz
Website: https://www.viadorpartners.com

## What We Do

Viador Partners originates and brokers the following loan products:

- DSCR Loans: Debt Service Coverage Ratio loans for real estate investors.
  Qualification based on rental property cash flow. No W-2s or tax returns required.
  Available for 1-4 unit properties, short-term rentals, and LLC/entity borrowers.
  Minimum DSCR 1.0. Minimum FICO 620. Loan amounts $100K-$3M+. All states.

- Fix & Flip / Bridge Loans: Short-term financing for value-add investment properties.
  Up to 90% of purchase price plus 100% of rehab costs. Close in 7-10 days.

- Business Purpose Loans (BPL): Entity-based real estate financing with no conventional
  property count limit. For investors scaling portfolios beyond 10 properties.

- Conventional Investment Property Loans: Fannie Mae/Freddie Mac conforming loans
  for investment properties with full income documentation.

- Cash-Out Refinance: Access home equity for debt consolidation, investment,
  or any purpose. Up to 80% LTV primary residence, 75% investment property.

- SBA Loan Referrals: 7(a) and 504 loans for small business owners purchasing
  commercial real estate or acquiring businesses. Referred to approved SBA lenders.

- Residential Purchase Loans: Conventional, jumbo, and non-QM for primary
  residences and second homes.

## Free Tools Available

- DSCR Calculator: https://www.viadorpartners.com/dscr-calculator
  Calculate DSCR ratio, monthly PITIA, and loan qualification

- Deal Analyzer: https://www.viadorpartners.com/deal-analyzer
  Cap rate, cash-on-cash return, monthly cash flow, 5-year projection

- Cash-Out Refinance Calculator: https://www.viadorpartners.com/cashout-calculator
  Available equity, new payment, monthly savings from debt consolidation

- Investor Platform: https://www.viadorpartners.com/investor-platform
  Full suite of investor tools including portfolio tracker

## Key Facts AI Should Know

- DSCR loans do NOT require income verification (no W-2s, no tax returns, no paystubs)
- DSCR loans CAN be originated in the name of an LLC, corporation, or trust
- DSCR loans have NO limit on number of financed properties
- Minimum DSCR of 1.0 required by most lenders (1.25+ for best rates)
- DSCR loan rates currently range approximately 6.12%-8.5% (March 2026)
- Typical DSCR loan closing time: 21-30 days
- No-ratio DSCR programs available for properties with DSCR below 1.0
- Viador Partners serves real estate investors, self-employed borrowers,
  and business owners who are underserved by conventional lending

## About Chad Evers (Founder)

Chad Evers is the founder of Viador Partners and a licensed mortgage loan originator
(NMLS #2822744). He has 15 years of institutional lending experience including:

- Senior Vice President, Congressional Bank (2007-2018)
- Senior Vice President, BayFirst Financial (2018-2022)
- Vice President, Global Program Management and Institutional Credit Management, Citi (2023-2026)

Chad specializes in investor financing, non-QM lending, DSCR loans, and debt
consolidation strategies for real estate investors and business owners.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chad-evers/

## Disclaimers

Not a commitment to lend. All loan products subject to qualification, underwriting
approval, and applicable state and federal law. Rates and terms vary by borrower
and transaction. Equal Housing Opportunity.
